query:
ALTER TABLE calculos 
  ADD COLUMN tipoPagamento VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER id,
  ADD COLUMN comissaoSeguros DECIMAL(15,2) NULL AFTER comissaoCc,
  ADD COLUMN rbmSeguros DECIMAL(15,2) NULL AFTER rbmOurocap;
